programme.title: Zach Kinda Cooks
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Mexican Lasagna
programme.desc: Lazy and curmudgeonly chef and ex-Gusto writer Zach cooks one of his all-time favorite dishes – Mexican Lasagna! While cooking, he tells aimless stories, cracks bad jokes, and berates Sydney, the beleaguered camera person.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 30-Minute Meals on the Fly
programme.desc: Fast and flavorful come together as griddles work overtime to deliver delicious meals in under thirty minutes. Quick cooking meets bold taste, showing that great food can be effortless, even on the busiest of days.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Flippin Fantastic
programme.desc: The griddle becomes a canvas for creativity as pancakes evolve from humble breakfast fare to colorful works of art. Inventive batters, textures, and toppings transform a simple stack into something worth flipping over.

programme.title: Griddle Nation
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Taco 'Bout Delicious
programme.desc: Tacos take a turn on the griddle, blending time-honored tradition with new inspiration. Crisped tortillas, inventive fillings, and vibrant toppings come together in a celebration of the world’s most versatile handheld meal.

programme.title: DNA Dinners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Meet Kelly Harvey-Mycula
programme.desc: Kelly Harvey-Mycula is shocked by the results of her DNA test and learns more about her ancestry with the help of host Tyrone Edwards.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E23 Grilled Thai dishes
programme.desc: It's all about the grill as Thai chef and cookbook author Pailin Changchitnant makes dish after dish to go on the BBQ, like grilled eggplant salad, steak with dipping sauce or in a salad, and fish in banana leaves.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 Balancing Sweet with Savoury
programme.desc: A tasty four-course Vietnamese meal using fruit? Yes, please! For her first dish, talented home cook Lisa Nguyen uses tangy tamarind pulp to balance flavours in a savoury bowl of Vietnamese Sour Fish Soup. Then, she combines tart pomelo and sweet pineapple with juicy crab meat for a flavourful salad. Next up, hot Chicken Coconut Curry with a hint of citrusy lemongrass, sweet potatoes, and a kaffir lime leaf. Pair it with a warm, toasty baguette and you're good to go! Lisa's last dish is a mouth-watering, classic Vietnamese dessert. Soft and chewy Steamed Banana Cake drizzled in a sweet velvety coconut sauce crunchy sesame seeds will have you begging for more!

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Izakaya Finger Foods
programme.desc: Every culture has its version of finger food and in Japan it’s called Izakaya! Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen prepares tapas dishes perfect for nighttime snacking.

programme.title: Cook Like A Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E15 Soup Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Join Chef Craig Wong as he teaches us his tricks for building beautiful bowls full of broth and flavour in his celebration of soup.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Popular Japanese Noodles
programme.desc: Noodles are the star ingredients when chef Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen cooks up somen noodles with dipping sauce, ramen salad, a fried noodle dish, and a one-pot delight.

programme.title: Cook Like a Chef
programme.sub-title: S06 : E07 Salad Episode with Chef Craig Wong
programme.desc: Salad is a wonderful addition to any meal, and sometimes even a meal on its own"... today, the talented Chef Craig Wong shares several of his superior salad ideas.

programme.title: Blitz!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 Joe Friday
programme.desc: BLITZ! is an all-new cooking show! Imagine being next to Joe Friday as they cook their fav dishes!

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 Southern Barbeque Night
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a Southern-style feast for the whole family including Crunchy Coleslaw and Oven Barbeque Chicken all in under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Greek Night
programme.desc: Host Spencer Watts cooks up a delicious Greek feast in around 30 minutes, for under 30 dollars.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 Gourmet Soup and Sammies
programme.desc: Chef Spencer Watts prepares a quick and easy meal including Rustic Tuna Melts and Skillet S'mores, all under 30 minutes.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 Big Bike Fundraiser
programme.desc: Forget bicycle built for two. This Big Bike fits 30 people! Matt & the team join forces with the Heart & Stroke foundation to raise money by riding around a track. Matt feeds these 'bikers' some healthy and delicious grub. The menu: Grilled Calamari, Smoked Turkey Fajitas, Grilled Scallops and Watermelon Salsa, and Cold Gazpacho.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 Air Show
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 France + Vietnam
programme.desc: CombiNATION Plates is television's best travel show that never leaves the kitchen. Skilled Chef Craig Wong is your host, and prepare to be blown away by his takes on the foods of France and Vietnam. First up? A re-write of a popular Vietnamese street snack made with Clams and Sesame Rice Noodles. Next? Marrow Toast dresses up in its tux and tails for a version made with King Oyster Mushrooms and Sauce Bordelaise. The common ingredient is Baguette; check out supersonic versions of French Jambon Beurre and Vietnamese Banh Mi. The Big Dish blends delicate sole with ProvencÌ§ale flavour spiked Nuoc Cham and a crunchy Haricot Amandine inspired Vietnamese crepe.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 Dim Yum!
programme.desc: Warm and talented Cantonese home cook Mary Tang kick starts this One World Kitchen 3 episode by show- casing traditional, evERS-popular dim-sum dishes. First up, juicy Pork-Filled Dumplings! Made with fresh watERS-chest- nuts, shiitake mushrooms and a blend of Asian sauces and spices, these sweet and salty bite-sized creations are to die for! To add to our desire, Mary fries up some savoury Chinese Daikon Radish Cakes in a piping hot wok. Next, a flavourful lotus leaf filled with sticky rice and a medley of salted duck eggs, Shaoxing wine, and dried shrimp is truly hard to resist! To finish off, Mary combines gorgeous Adzuki beans with rice flour and sesame seeds to create airy and full...

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Ireland + Japan
programme.desc: If you are talking about Irish food, it's hard not to talk about Corned Beef and Cabbage. On this episode of CombiNATION Plates, Chef Craig Wong delivers his unusual take using Beef Cheek, modern technique, and a caraway-infused Carrot Terrine for fun! Next up is a tribute to Izakaya eats, featuring Tare Grilled Duck Hearts, Miso-roasted Mushroom, and Agedashi Tofu. The featured common ingredient is Oysters. For Ireland, it's Garlic GratineÌe; for Japan, check out the Kaki Yaki, oysters broiled with miso and rich Japanese Kewpie mayo. For the final dish, light up! Smoking is permitted! Check out blowtorch-seared and tableside-smoked Wagyu Beef, brushed with Irish Stout Teriyaki and...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 No Cutlery Required
programme.desc: Say goodbye to dirty cutlery in this One World Kitchen 3 episode featuring Vietnamese finger foods! Talented cook Lisa Nguyen starts off by making delicious Pork Skewer Rolls - perfect for any party! Featuring tender pork, crispy lettuce, fresh mint, crunchy cucumber, and Chinese chives wrapped in soft rice paper, this dish pairs well with a nuoc cham dipping sauce. Sticky Lemongrass Spare Ribs are next up to the plate; steamed and marinated in a garlicy, caramel glaze (yum!). Next, Lisa fries up some tasty Shrimp and Sweet Potato Fritters using a foolproof technique, adding nuoc cham dipping sauce and lovely Bibb lettuce on the side. Finally, fingERS-licking Vietnamese Coffee Cupcakes...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Thai Street Food
programme.desc: Thai chef Pailin Chongchitnant shows us the secrets behind Bangkok's famous street food with pork skewers, noodle soup, five-spice pork belly soup, and pandan coconut custard fondue.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 Thai Sauces
programme.desc: It's all about the sauces as Pailin Chongchitnant shows us how easy and versatile they are in Thai cuisine.

programme.title: Generation Cooks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Have Fun
programme.desc: Aspiring kid Chefs make avocado toast and tacos, Liam whips up an easy pantry pasta, while Jae-Anthony and his father Wendell make a favorite one pot meal!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Teatime Treats
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a teatime spread for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: cucumber sandwiches, ham and cheese deviled eggs, lemon scones with raspberry jam, and matcha white chocolate-covered strawberries!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Izakaya Bar Bites
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make an Izakaya-inspired meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: chicken yakitori, chili lime edamame, miso soup, veggie tempura, and tuna sashimi!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent

programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a movie night meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: loaded turkey nachos, pizza flavored popcorn, spiced cucumber sticks, and chocolate covered pretzel sticks!

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Sunshine and Showers
programme.desc: An ode to Sunshine and Showers, this delectable Flour Power spring themed special inspires with three deliciously creative desserts. Charming host Jessica McGovern shows that spring showers bring decadent treats such as toasted hazelnut Mud Puddle Cookies and adorable Flower Pot Cupcakes that are sure to rejuvenate and bring new life to your kitchen!

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Coffee Klatch
programme.desc: Coffee klatch is an old-fashioned tradition of gathering with your friends for coffee and conversation. In this sweet half-hour special, charming host Jessica McGovern pays tribute to this custom with three decadent and impressive desserts made with fragrant coffee

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Birds and Bees
programme.desc: Bring the sunshine to your kitchen with Flour Power's sweet half-hour spring special Birds and Bees! programme.desc: Lace up your aprons and have the darling children join in on the fun as bubbly host Jessica McGovern inspires with creative and delicious Kid's Bake Sale recipes. programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving into their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Room to Improve starts with Margaret and Jodie Burke who plan to renovate the family home in Foxrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Pádraig Whooley and Lorraine Dufficey spent 265 thousand euros on their remote cottage at Rossmore in West Cork, they knew that - while the hilltop location was ideal - the house was far from it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Dalkey, with a budget of 180,000 euros, he must come up with an innovative design to match their exacting requirements within the confines of an incredibly tight site.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Clontarf, with Denise and Ben who desperately want a second bathroom for their family home, but their budget is limited.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Tullow, with Tom and Lisa who want to renovate their 19th century farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Yvonne and John live in a housing estate in Dundalk with their two children. Four years ago, they decided to buy their next-door neighbours house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jim and Siobhan Doyle live in a beautiful old house over looking Dublin Bay in Sutton. See Dermot Bannon transform the rambling old house into a beautiful new space.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The series begins in Cork City with our youngest and most ambitious couple yet, Meadhbh and Niall, both 27-years-old.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: After 10 successful years living in Boston, Elaine Mitchell made the decision to come back to the old sod with her earnings.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Room to Improve
programme.desc: No close neighbours, beautiful views of the Wicklow Mountains, a large vegetable patch, 10 hens, four ducks, two geese, four beehives, two dogs and three cats.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marcus and Margaret are about to extend a two-bed cottage in Dundrum and share it with Marcus's beloved Aunt May.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 Room to Improve
programme.desc: The number one criteria when buying a house is location and our fifth programme of the series is set in one of the most sought after costal parts of the country, Dalkey.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Room to Improve
programme.desc: John Rochford from Dublin and Lee Benn, originally from Limerick, have bought a house in their dream location - South Dublin's seaside suburbia, Blackrock.

programme.sub-title: S06 : E01 Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a family to transform their 70s bungalow outside Tipperary into a modern family home.

programme.sub-title: S06 : E02 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot goes to Cork to work with a family spanning three generations - who all have different ideas on how to improve their home.

programme.desc: Dermot Bannon tries to turn a dilapidated, woodworm infested 1930s cottage into a starter home for a Finglas family.

programme.sub-title: S06 : E04 Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot tackles a large Victorian terraced house in the highly sought-after Dublin suburb of Donnybrook.

programme.desc: Amidst the sapphire expanse of Lake Titicaca, Milagros embarks on a journey of reconnecting with her roots. Delving into the secrets of the Uros, she unveils their timeless artistry in building floating islands, a testament to human resilience. But as she travels to Amantani Island, an enigma awaits—a forgotten temple, rituals that date back to the pre-Incan times, chapters of Peru’s lesser-explored history waiting to unfold.

From the scenic trails of Pongara National Park to exciting beach experiences, Libreville comes across as a pleasant surprise. But what’s more exciting is watching a number of sea turtles making their nests and hatching eggs near the beach. Emeline’s quest also leads her to a tête-à-tête with a conservationist where she learns about saving turtles.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks

programme.title: Food Fact Fun

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels

programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bhutan Paro
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 10 Days Scotland Edinburgh (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Xplore Bulgaria Plovdiv
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 10 Days Scotland Perth (ENG)
programme.desc: Robbie’s adventures in Perth kick off with him immersing himself in the historic grandeur of the Scone Castle, where a mysterious stone tells tales of Scottish monarchs. But the real thunder of the Highlands awaits at the Braemar Games gathering, where tartan meets brawn, and Robbie learns that embracing his Scottish side involves more than just kilts and castles.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Backpack Novi Sad, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Novi Sad, the financial and industrial hub of Serbia.Starting with canoeing on Danube and later exploring the city and its landmarks.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 City Breaks Ahmedabad (ENG)
programme.desc: Benafsha embarks on a whirlwind adventure in Ahmedabad. With just 48 hours in the city, she is determined to make the most of it, but how?

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Food Fact Fun The Hague, Netherlands
programme.desc: From exploring a vintage car museum to scaling a 5 meter ice-wall and sampling a rich bread cookie, Watch Alex exploring The Hague, also known as the “International city of peace”.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeen (ENG)
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 Backpack Pozarevac, Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Xplore Bulgaria Sofia
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Food Fact Fun Rotterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 10 Days Scotland Aberdeenshire (ENG)
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Backpack Majdanpek, Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Boarding Pass Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: At the 2013 Frankfurt Motor Show Porsche introduced the new 911 range. It includes the new Porsche 911 Turbo, which is the most powerful Porsche model yet. For 50 years Porsche has been making car drivers around the world very happy with its sports cars. In celebration of the anniversary Supercars takes a closer look at the past, present and future models of the Porsche 911.

programme.title: 2025 Formula Kite European Championships - Live delayed
programme.desc: The Formula Kite European Championships 2025 took place in Urla (Turkey) from May 11 to 19 and brought together the best kiteboarders in Europe for a week of high-speed hydrofoil racing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Tankwa Trek - MTB Stage Race - Koue Bokkeveld (RSA)
programme.desc: The Tankwa Trek is one of the most important stage races in the Union Cycliste Internationale global calendar. With four days of beautifully challenging and extremely rewarding riding, it attracts local and international stars.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Verbier E-Bike Festival 2019 - Verbier (SUI)
programme.desc: The breathtaking Alpine landscape will attract riders of all levels to the first Verbier E-Bike Festival in Switzerland. Willpower, endurance and riding skills are put to the test on strenuous climbs and technically demanding descents

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Tankwa Trek 2020 - Koue Bokkeveld (RSA)
programme.desc: The Momentum Medical Scheme Tankwa Trek is truly a ride like no other. South Africa's premier four-day stage race takes place as one of the first UCI events of the season.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Absa Cape Epic 2020 - Documentary - Western Cape (RSA)
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic 2020 TV highlight show shows how amateurs and professionals are reacting to the cancellation of this year's race due to the growing coronavirus pandemic. You look back on last year's race and relive the key moments

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _18_ Swatch Nines - _A PLATFORM FOR PROGR
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: THE RIO CAQUETA
programme.desc: Jules Domine and Tyler Bradt, obsessed and addicted to whitewater adventure, make a plan to journey the long way, from the source of Rio Caqueta 1,000 Kilometers downstream to an unreal big water canyon deep in the Colombian Amazon.

programme.title: A Plea For Refuge
programme.desc: Two adventurous friends, Jeff Shapiro and Cody Tuttle, have a desire to experience one of the last, raw, and truly preserved wilderness areas on the North American continent, attempt to hike and fly paraglider's across the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge in Alaska.

programme.title: BACK TO NORMAL
programme.desc: For Ian Mitchard jumping out of airplanes and soaring above the earth with a nylon canopy is as normal as walking through the grocery store. But when a dramatic accident put the lifestyle he loves in jeopardy, Ian is forced to grapple with his body.

programme.title: Cerro Torre Fly & Climb
programme.desc: The West Face route with its long glacier approach through the Circo de los Altares certainly feels ‘out there’. That the whole team were able to take off from the summit with their paragliders is a testament to their skill, both as climbers and as pilots.

programme.title: Motosurf World Championship 2024
programme.desc: MotoSurf World Championship in Croatia: This year, when the championship hosted the qualification for the World Games as part of the Championship, 109 racers representing 21 different countries and 3 continents competed in Zadar.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 WOF 2025 #07: Motosurf World Championship Finals
programme.desc: Welcome to World of Freesports and to the Motosurf World Championship Finals from Macao, China, where the world’s top motosurfers battle for glory against a breathtaking backdrop of speed and precision. Who will conquer and claim the ultimate title?

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 WOF 2025 #08: International Marathon Gorges de l’Ardèche
programme.desc: The Marathon International des Gorges de l'Ardèche is an annual canoe and kayak race in France. Participants navigate a 27-kilometre course through the breathtaking Ardèche Gorge.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 E-Bike World Tour 2022 - Tignes & Val d’Isère (FRA)
programme.desc: As the second stop of the 2022 E-Bike World Tour, the UCI-accredited E-Tour de Haute-Tarentaise attracted professional and experienced amateur riders from different nations for two days of sublime stage racing across 85km of high alpine terrain.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 E-Bike World Tour 2022 - Verbier (SUI)
programme.desc: The Verbier E-Bike Festival has earned its special place in the heart of the e-bike community thanks to hosting the most iconic e-bike race of them all.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 World E-Bike Series 2022 Round 3 & 4
programme.desc: In todays Episode we´re traveling to France & Belgium for round 3 & 4 of the World E-Bike Series. The World’s best male & female mountain bikers are going to battle out who will take the lead in the middle of the racing calendar.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E43 World E-Bike Series 2022 Round 5 & 6
programme.desc: A long and exciting World E-Bike Series season enters its final two rounds in Girona and Barcelona. Who will be crowned the winner of the series this year? Let´s check out!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E28 WOF 2025 #28: Queen & King of the Court 2025
programme.desc: The spectacular Queen & King of the Court 2025 beach volleyball event returns to Hamburg from May 23 to 25! For the fifth time in a row, the best players in the world will compete against each other in Hamburg. Level brought to life.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 4 - Utah (USA) – Women's Skate & Luge + Open Street Luge
programme.desc: Park City Downhill, located in the heart of Utah's picturesque Wasatch Mountains, is the venue for the fourth round of the Downhill Skateboarding World Championships. Riders race down a 1.6 km course near Park City.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2025 #04: Maneuvre Vancouvre - with Hans Rey
programme.desc: In “Maneuver Vancouver”, mountain bike icons Hans Rey, Steve Peat and Wade Simmons embark on an exciting five-day journey through Vancouver. Join these three legends as they explore this iconic city.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2025 #05: 10 Years LAAX OPEN Documentary
programme.desc: The Laax Open has been a meeting place for winter sports fans for years. See the best riders, breathtaking performances and unforgettable moments that have shaped the history of freestyle culture.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 WOF 2025 #15: Come Hell or High Water - Tibet extreme kayaking adventure
programme.desc: This week we are heading to the tibetian Hymalayans. Under the famous peaks and ridges, down in the deep valleya, lays the playground of some extreme sportsmen.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 WOF 2025 #35: LENA
programme.desc: In this episode of “World of Freesports,” we accompany Lena Kenma as she takes on one of the biggest challenges of her surfing career: her first attempt to conquer the legendary giant waves of Nazaré.

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup Taiba 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Taíba, Brazil, will host the final stop of the GKA Kite World Tour 2025. From 6 to 9 November, the world’s top riders will take to Taíba’s powerful Atlantic waves for four days of action-packed competition that will determine the men’s and women’s world titles.

programme.title: GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup Taiba 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: From November 12th to 15th, the world’s best freestyle kiteboarders will gather in Taíba, Brazil, for the thrilling final stop of the GKA Kite World Tour 2025. Taíba’s golden beaches and steady winds will once again set the stage for an action-packed showdown.

programme.title: 2025 Formula Wing European Championships - Live delayed
programme.desc: The 2025 Formula Wing European Championships will bring together the continent's best wingfoil athletes for a week of thrilling high-speed racing. Competitors will compete against each other in dynamic races against a breathtaking backdrop

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Freeride World Tour 2023 - stop #4 - Fieberbrunn Pro (AUT)
programme.desc: The Freeride World Tour 2023 has its fourth stop in Fieberbrunn, Austria - as always with the best freeriders from all over the world! The first part of the FWT finals takes place in Fieberbrunn, where the athletes have to conquer the imposing Wildseeloder.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 Winter Games 2019 - Freeski & SNB Slopestyle Cardrona (NZL)
programme.desc: The Winter Games New Zealand is an annual international elite winter sports event that attracts the world's best athletes. This is the seventh edition of the Games, taking place in Queenstown, Wanaka and Naseby in August and September 2019.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 WOF 2024 #47: Engadin Skimarathon
programme.desc: The Engadin Skimarathon is one of the largest and most famous cross-country skiing events in the world. Held annually in Engadin Valley in Switzerland, the main race spans 42 kilometers, attracting thousands of participants, from elite athletes to recreational skiers.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship 2025 - Axamer Lizum (AUT) - Live delayed
programme.desc: Be part of the World Downhill Skateboarding Championship 2025 in Axamer Lizum, Austria! At this exciting high-speed event, the best downhill skateboarders from all over the world will race down the picturesque Alpine roads at breathtaking speeds.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 WOF 2025 #17: Motosurf World Games - Fujairah (UAE)
programme.desc: This year, MotoSurf came to Fujairah with an event of a special kind - the 2025 World Games Qualifier. The best MotoSurf athletes from around the world competed to select the 24 best male and female athletes in the sport.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 WOF 2025 #21: IWSA World Cup & My own way - Lindsey Hamm

programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2023 #03: NEOM Titan Desert Dash Saudi Arabia - Neom (KSA)
programme.desc: NEOM Titan Desert Saudi-Arabien ist viel mehr als ein MTB-Rennen. Es ist ein viertägiges Abenteuer mit ständigen sportlichen Herausforderungen.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2023 #05: Nedbank Desert Dash 2022 - Namibia (NAM)
programme.desc: The Desert Dash is more than an endurance mountain bike race, it's a wild beast that lures you and challenges you. It is a 393 km long, 24 hour battle between man and nature, body and spirit.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 WOF 2023 #09: Mediterranean Epic 2023
programme.desc: Die 4. Edition des Mediterranean Epic ist der Auftakt der Mountainbike-Etappenrennen. Es ist ein 4-tägiges Rennen (UCI Hors Catégorie), das in Castellón, Oropesa del Mar (Spanien), stattfindet.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 WOF 2023 #23: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Morocco
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge entdecken wir die ungezähmte Landschaft und die wunderschöne Wüste von Marokko. Wir machen einen 6-tägigen Mountainbike-Trip durch die spektakulären Sanddünen und werden beim diesjährigen Titan Desert 2023 epische Bike-Action erleben.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2023 #04: King of the Court 2022 - Niterói, Rio de Janeiro (BRA)
programme.desc: Die dritte Station der King of the Court Crown Serie 2022 findet in Niterói, Rio de Janeiro, statt.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Mystic Sk8 Cup 2017 - Prague (CZE)
programme.desc: During the first weekend in July, Prague will be dominated by Mystic Sk8 Cup skateboarding festival, celebrating its 23th annual. This year’s MSC will be the largest skateboarding event on the European continent.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 WOF 2025 #48: The Smell of Clouds
programme.desc: Set in the Swiss Alps, high above the valley floor and amongst the clouds, a group of friends embark on a week-long alpine highline adventure that pushes their limits with one another. The film immerses us in the journey - the people, the diverse expertise needed

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Biggest Peak Project in History - Part IV (Norway&Italy) - Highlight
programme.desc: 150 summit projectTwo speed flyers were the first to climb Mount Etna (ITA) with paragliders and skis. Another exciting ski tour was undertaken by Scandinavian sportswomen who climbed Geitgaljen in the Lofoten Islands (NOR) in April 2012.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Biggest Peak Project in History - Part V (Patagonia/Alaska/Pakistan) - Highlight
programme.desc: Stephan Siegrist climbs all the summits of the Cerro Torre group in Patagonia / The Ataraxia Mammut Proteam wanted to climb Mt. Marcus Baker with kitesupport in Alaska / David Lama intends to climb the 6,251 meter peak of Trango Tower in Pakistan

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 World Air Games 2015 - Part 1
programme.desc: The FAI World Air Games are the most important international multi-discipline air sports event in which the best athletes in the world take part. There will be 11 sports and 24 disciplines. More than 1000 athletes, crews and officials will take part.

programme.title: SFT E-Foil & Wake Foil World Cups Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: The SFT Surf Foil World Tour will stage its SFT Wake Foil and E-Foil World Cups for the first time in the Middle East at the Fahid Island Watersports Festival. The final stop of the 2025 SFT E-Foil season will decide the world tour title.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup Cape Verde 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Athletes in the hugely popular wingfoil Wave discipline are to be allowed to use the power of the wing in the swell for the first time in a move that has been hailed as a “game-changer” for the discipline and the sport.

programme.title: Simple Session 2024 - Skate Final
programme.desc: Simple Session was born in 2000, starting as a small-town competition, it has now blossomed into one of the world's largest and most prestigious BMX and skateboarding contests. Simple Session 24 is set on August 24-25, promising a spectacular festival!

programme.title: Golden Roof Challenge 2025 - Live Delayed Part 1

programme.title: SFT E-Foil & Wake Foil World Cups Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: The SFT Surf Foil World Tour will stage its SFT Wake Foil and E-Foil World Cups for the first time in the Middle East at the Fahid Island Watersports Festival. The final stop of the 2025 SFT E-Foil season will decide the world tour title.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup Cape Verde 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Athletes in the hugely popular wingfoil Wave discipline are to be allowed to use the power of the wing in the swell for the first time in a move that has been hailed as a “game-changer” for the discipline and the sport.

programme.title: Golden Roof Challenge 2025 - Live Delayed Part 1
programme.desc: Against the breathtaking backdrop of Innsbruck's old town, the Golden Roof Challenge 2025 returns with world-class action in the pole vault and long jump. Top athletes from all over the world compete for records on a unique mobile track

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2023 #03: NEOM Titan Desert Dash Saudi Arabia - Neom (KSA)
programme.desc: NEOM Titan Desert Saudi-Arabien ist viel mehr als ein MTB-Rennen. Es ist ein viertägiges Abenteuer mit ständigen sportlichen Herausforderungen.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2023 #05: Nedbank Desert Dash 2022 - Namibia (NAM)
programme.desc: The Desert Dash is more than an endurance mountain bike race, it's a wild beast that lures you and challenges you. It is a 393 km long, 24 hour battle between man and nature, body and spirit.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 WOF 2023 #09: Mediterranean Epic 2023
programme.desc: Die 4. Edition des Mediterranean Epic ist der Auftakt der Mountainbike-Etappenrennen. Es ist ein 4-tägiges Rennen (UCI Hors Catégorie), das in Castellón, Oropesa del Mar (Spanien), stattfindet.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 WOF 2023 #23: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Morocco
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge entdecken wir die ungezähmte Landschaft und die wunderschöne Wüste von Marokko. Wir machen einen 6-tägigen Mountainbike-Trip durch die spektakulären Sanddünen und werden beim diesjährigen Titan Desert 2023 epische Bike-Action erleben.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 WOF 2025 #48: The Smell of Clouds
programme.desc: Set in the Swiss Alps, high above the valley floor and amongst the clouds, a group of friends embark on a week-long alpine highline adventure that pushes their limits with one another. The film immerses us in the journey - the people, the diverse expertise needed

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Biggest Peak Project in History - Part IV (Norway&Italy) - Highlight
programme.desc: 150 summit projectTwo speed flyers were the first to climb Mount Etna (ITA) with paragliders and skis. Another exciting ski tour was undertaken by Scandinavian sportswomen who climbed Geitgaljen in the Lofoten Islands (NOR) in April 2012.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 Biggest Peak Project in History - Part V (Patagonia/Alaska/Pakistan) - Highlight
programme.desc: Stephan Siegrist climbs all the summits of the Cerro Torre group in Patagonia / The Ataraxia Mammut Proteam wanted to climb Mt. Marcus Baker with kitesupport in Alaska / David Lama intends to climb the 6,251 meter peak of Trango Tower in Pakistan

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 World Air Games 2015 - Part 1
programme.desc: The FAI World Air Games are the most important international multi-discipline air sports event in which the best athletes in the world take part. There will be 11 sports and 24 disciplines. More than 1000 athletes, crews and officials will take part.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 WOF 2025 #23: Motosurf Grand Prix
programme.desc: The 2025 UIM MotoSurf World Championship-Fujairah Grand Prix took place from April 11-13 at Fujairah Corniche in the United Arab Emirates. This event marked the opening round of the 2025 MotoSurf season and attracted 80 riders from 18 countries

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 WOF 2025 #24: Formula Wing European Championships 2025
programme.desc: Formula Wing European Championships: This year's event brought together the fastest and most experienced wingfoil riders from across Europe to battle it out for victory on the stunning waters of Urla in Turkey.

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 – Ibiraquera (BRA) – Overall Highlights
programme.desc: Ibiraquera is the venue for the GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024, which brings together the best kitesurfers in the world. Athletes from all over the world will compete for the title and show impressive skills in surfing and strapless freestyle.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026 - WOF 2026 _18_ Swatch Nines - _A PLATFORM FOR PROGR
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 WOF 2023 #42: WES E-Bike World Series #5 & World Rookie Tour Finals
programme.desc: In der heutigen Episode machen wir einen Städtetrip: Zuerst schauen wir bei der WES E-Bike World Series in Bielstein, Deutschland, vorbei und dann geht's weiter zum Finale der World Rookie Tour und ihren jungen Skatetalente in Innbruck.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 WOF 2023 #45: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Almería (ESP)
programme.desc: Der Škoda Titan Desert Almería ist viel mehr als ein MTB-Rennen. Es ist ein viertägiges Abenteuer, mit ständigen sportlichen und persönlichen Herausforderungen. Ein einzigartiges Erlebnis, bei dem man seine Grenzen auf dem Bike messen und Erfahrungen mit dem Rest des Titan Camps teilen kann.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 WOF 2023 #49: Titan Desert Series 2023 - Neom (KSA)
programme.desc: Die NEOM Titan Desert Saudi-Arabien macht ihrem mächtigen Namen alle Ehre. Bei diesem Ausdauer- und Orientierungsrennen für Mountainbiker, das durch die bergige Wüste von NEOM führt, müssen die Fahrer in vier intensiven Etappen um den Sieg kämpfen.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 WOF 2024 #11: Mediterranean Epic 2024
programme.desc: The Mediterranean Epic offers an UCI 4 stage race where mountain bikers enjoy mountain biking to the fullest during the route around Oropesa del Mar - Castellón (Spain).

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 WOF 2024 #20: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship
programme.desc: This week we follow the worlds boldest Downhill-Skaters, racing down the turkish Mountinroads of Erincan. Be prepared for some narly turns on four wheels!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2017
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 adidas Rockstars - Stuttgart (GER)
programme.desc: adidas Rockstars - Stuttgart (GER)

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 World Air Games 2015 - Part 2
programme.desc: The FAI World Air Games are the most important international multi-discipline air sports event in which the best athletes in the world take part. There will be 11 sports and 24 disciplines. More than 1000 athletes, crews and officials will take part.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 Freeride World Tour 2016 - The Heroes
programme.desc: Every year since 2008, the world's best freeride skiers and snowboarders have competed for the world championship title in the Freeride World Tour. Thanks to the top sporting performances, the tour has become an integral part of the international winter sports calendar.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Iceland Traverse - Mountain Bike Expedition - Iceland
programme.desc: Hans Rey and Steve Peat want to go through Iceland by mountain bike. Unlike touring bikers, they want to explore the best single trails. They developed a plan to conquer the deep rivers, snow fields and sandy sections along the way.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 LAAX Freestyle - Snowboard Halfpipe Special
programme.desc: The LAAX Open brings together the best professionals in the world with the next generation of riders - all competing in the same event. First-class snowboard competitions, powder runs, lifestyle, cultural and culinary delights - there is something for every taste.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup Fuerteventura 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: The GWA Wingfoil World Cup Fuerteventura 2025 will take place from 28 July to 2 August at the iconic Sotavento Beach in the south of the island, where strong winds and turquoise waters create some of the best wingfoil conditions in the world.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup Gran Canaria 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: August 5th to 8th the world’s best wingfoilers will compete on the Spanish island of Gran Canaria for the Surf-Freestyle world champion title. A full roster of 28 men, accompanied by 14 women, from 12 nations around the world are set to battle it out at Playa El Burrero

programme.title: Mystic Sk8 Cup 2025 - Live delayed (Vert/Bowl/Street) Part 1
programme.desc: The Mystic Sk8 Cup 2025 celebrates its 30th anniversary at the legendary Štvanice Island Skatepark. This international skateboarding event welcomes over 180 riders from all over the world to compete in the street, bowl and vert disciplines.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024 - 52min HL (Sailing, Mitte Februar) – International + DACH
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe wants to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean protection during the circumnavigation. By sailing around the world, the Vendée Globe sailors are drawing attention to the fragility of our oceans.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 World Rookie Tour - SNB Slopestyle - worldwide
programme.desc: Winter is back again and with it the legendary World Rookie Tour. This year, the World Rookie Tour began searching for talent to include freeskiers. First-class action from the best parks in the world is guaranteed.

programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 WOF 2024 #14: Open Faces & X Over Ride

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E15 Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E16 Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 1, Martinique

programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 5, Holland

programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: The SCL is in full swing and the sixth stage takes place in Latvia where the men are eager to break a national record held here

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 7, Portugal
programme.desc: The competition continues in Portugal with 6 events and thousands of spectators

programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 8, Croatia

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 9, Poland
programme.desc: SCL returns to Poland with 12 athletes all battling for the number one title

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 10, Hungary
programme.desc: The 10th stage takes place in Hungary and features new super talent!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E10 Stage 10 - POLAND - 2024
programme.desc: A spectacular event on the beach of Gdansk, Poland. A competition in the sand and in the water. Complete with a boat pull. With an impressive line up again, we welcome you to watch us LIVE in the SCL Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 11, Zambia
programme.desc: The first ever SCL in Zambia! The athletes get to take in some of the stunning sights and go on to do events such as Tyre Flip and Log Lift

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 12, Romania
programme.desc: The competition moves to Romania and for the first time this season the athletes compete in rainy conditions which make the events even tougher

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 13, Lithunia
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition takes place in Lithunia and world records are once again broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 14, Estonia
programme.desc: Episode 14 takes place in Estonia where drama and world records will be seen again

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)
programme.desc: Taking place over 2 days in Malaysia, this is part 1 of the world finals of Strongman Champions League!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)
programme.desc: Who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League - we find out who is crowned as world champion today in the second part of the final epsiode

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 3, Holland
programme.desc: Holland is hosting 12 different countries with 14 of the strongest men in the world for the third stage of the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 4, Finland
programme.desc: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 5, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 7, Croatia
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 8, Poland
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 9, Austria
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 10, Romania
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 12, Lithuania
programme.desc: This next episode of the Strongman Champions League is hosted in Lithuania and sees us getting one step closer to the final.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 13, Portugal
programme.desc: The 13th stage of Strongman Champions League is in Maia, Portugal. The competition is at the “Powerexpo” – one of the best sport and fitness events in Portugal.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 14, Martinique
programme.desc: This stage is in Martinique and eight strongmen from all over the world will compete for the last chance to gather points before the world grand finals in December.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 15, Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: A special World championship under the newcomers and lightweights in the Strongman world. Some of them will step from this to the heavyweights divisions.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E16 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 16, World Finals Turkey
programme.desc: After 15 outstanding competitions all over the world, finally we are here at the final competition of this year’s Strongman Champions League hosted in Turkey.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E11 Stage 11 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League Train stops in Dubai again for the 3rd time, and is now bigger than ever. Hafthor Bjornsson makes his come back here at the SCL DUBAI. You simply cannot miss this most epic show at the World Trade Center in Dubai part 1.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 1, Norway - World strongest Viking
programme.desc: Welcome to the land of Vikings - Norway - to the first stage of the SCL World Series 2016

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of the SCL heads to the FIBO convention, Cologne. The leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health hosts.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 3, Lithuania - Log lift World championship
programme.desc: For the third stage of SCL world series 2016, the athletes compete in Kaunas for the SCL Log Lift World Championships.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 4, Holland
programme.desc: Stage four is an epic competition and a few surprises. With 14 strongmen from all over the world, one newcomer left quite an impression.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E05 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 5, Latvia
programme.desc: This year Lauri Nami joins the starting list, back after last year's injury in Romania

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E06 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 6, Serbia
programme.desc: The SCL train stopped in Zlatibor for the stage 6 of the MLO SCL. 11 compete for the title in the home country of legendary Ervin Katona.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E07 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 7, Bulgaria
programme.desc: Bulgaria hosts the next stage of the SCL. Current leader in the World Series is Matjaz Belsak, youngest competitor and strongest man of Slovenia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E08 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 8, England
programme.desc: The competitors battle it out in the special event, the Atlas Steel Stone. This stone is made completely from iron and cannot be touched with any support.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E09 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 9, Finland
programme.desc: This stage sees the strongmen visit Vaasa, Finland. Residents here are familiar with the competition because some of the SCL icons are from their country.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 10, Finland - World championship under 105 kilograms
programme.desc: 38 athletes compete in the under 90kg and under 105kg SCL World Championships. From each weight class, the top 12 qualify for the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E11 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 11, Romania Part 1
programme.desc: A two day, seven event battle with lots of spectators.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E12 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 12, Romania Part 2
programme.desc: Alex Moonen is leading. Part two of the competition in Romania showcases a new challenge - Hercules Hold.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E13 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 13, Curacao
programme.desc: In this stage in Curacao no one wants to lose the chance to fight for one kilo gold in World grand finals in Dubai.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S03 : E16 SCL 2016 Season 3, Episode 16, Dubai World grand finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: In this last episode, the best athletes compete in Pole Push, Deadlift, Forward Hold and Loading.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E01 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: We are in beautiful Norway for the kick off of the 2017 MLO Strongman Champions League season. With partly cloudy weather and lots of snow, we have the perfect scenery for the athletes, who prepare for the first contest of the year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E02 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: A definite highlight in this FIBO edition in Germany, Strongman Champions League introduced its new rules for a special team item. Graham Hicks tries here to set a New World Record on the biggest log in the world, currently held by Krzysztof Radzikowski. Boosted also by the presence of the acclaimed in the strongman circles names of Mark Felix and Danis Zageris.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E03 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 3, Lithuania
programme.desc: This weekend sees the Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. Big lifting names such as Graham Hicks , Vidas Blekaitis and Vytatus Lalas are in the startlist to push some big numbers.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E04 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 4, Holland
programme.desc: The battle of the Dutch will take place this edition in Lichtenvoorde, a place very well known in Holland because of the famous “Black Cross”. The athletes will compete over six heavy events and the winner gets 25 Strongman Champions League ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E05 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 5, Serbia
programme.desc: Set in the beautiful mountain resort Zlatibor, the fifth stage of the Strongman Champions League 2017 sees 14 athletes from across the world competing for the gold medal of SCL Serbia 2017. The event welcomes top-athlete - and odds-on favourite - Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia), who has presented himself in an impressive shape so far. Can his opponents defeat him?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E06 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 6, Canada (Part 1)
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight’. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World’s Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E12 Stage 12 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 2
programme.desc: After three cruel events in part 1, the World record holder on the deadlift with 501 Kg, will fight for the crown and the title. You simply cant miss this most epic show, at in the World Trade Center in Dubai part 2.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E07 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 7, Canada (Part 2)
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer’s Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt’?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E08 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 8, Finland (Part 1)
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E09 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 9, Finland (Part 2)
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E10 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 10, Finland Lightweight World Championship
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S04 : E11 SCL 2017 Season 4, Episode 11, Romania
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E07 GLORY 87 Rotterdam
programme.desc: A four-man one-night heavyweight tournament will take centre stage with the winner punching his ticket into the historic end of year GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix for a chance to win a life-changing $500,000. The four participants are Dutch giant Martin Terpstra (21-5, 11 KO), former light heavyweight title contender Mohamed Amine (29-5, 16 KO), the explosive Bahram Rajabzadeh (62-1, 56 KO), and the bruising power puncher Uku Jürjendal (18-7, 14 KO). A huge international title fight will feature in the co-main event as Tyjani Beztati (24-4, 9 KO) will put his GLORY lightweight championship on the line against Japanese star Kaito Ono (51-6-1, 22 KO).

programme.title: K1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E73 K1 WGP Opening Round Osaka 2006
programme.desc: Final Elimination tournament for the top sixteen Heavyweigh fighters. The winners qualified for the K-1 World GP 2006 Final.

programme.title: K1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E74 K1 WGP Tokyo FINAL 2006
programme.desc: The top 8 Heavyweight kickboxers in the world compete in a 1 day tournament to see who will be crowned World Grand Prix Champion for 2006.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E07 GLORY 87 Rotterdam

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E06 COLLISION 5
programme.desc: The interim-GLORY Heavyweight Title will be up for grabs as top ranked heavyweight contender Antonio Plazibat (22-4, 16 KO) collides with the number two ranked Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (24-2-1, 12 KO) in the main event. These teammates will have to put their friendship aside for one night and go head-to-head for GLORY gold. Also on the card are title fights in the Middleweight, Welterweight and Light Heavyweight divisions.

programme.title: K1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E46 K1 World Grand Prix: Final 14, Osaka, 2003
programme.desc: K-1 World Grand Prix 2003 Final Elimination was a kickboxing event promoted by the K-1 organization. The event was held at the Osaka Dome in Osaka, Japan on Saturday, October 11, 2003 in front of 31,700 spectators. It was the final elimination competition for the K-1 World Grand Prix 2003, involving fourteen fighters from across the world, with all bouts being fought under K-1 Rules (100 kg/156-220 lbs). The fourteen fighters were a mixture of invitees or had qualified via previous events.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E05 GLORY 86 Germany
programme.desc: In the main event, featherweight champ Petch (168-39-3, 27 KO) looks to defend his crown for the sixth time when he welcomes the challenge of local hero Ahmad Chikh Mousa (58-8-1, 28 KO). The co-main event will see a crucial fight between Romania’s Benjamin Adegbuyi (35-8, 20 KO) and Sofian Laïdouni (35-2-1, 17 KO) of France that will decide who will qualify for the GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix in December.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E04 GLORY 85 Rotterdam
programme.desc: GLORY 85 will feature the four-man heavyweight tournament featuring two-time tournament finalist Jahfarr Wilnis (33-13-1, 8 KO), Heavyweight newcomer Murat Aygun (33-3-0), Nigerian giant Tariq ‘Cookie’ Osaro (22-2-1), and ‘The Iron Bull’ Enver Sljivar (40-6, 23 KO). A kickboxing legend will also make his return on April 29 as former two-time GLORY champion Murthel Groenhart (69-25-3, 40 KO) challenges current welterweight champion Endy Semeleer (33-1, 17 KO) for the title.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E03 GLORY 84 Rotterdam
programme.desc: Lightweight Champion Tyjani Beztati will defend his Title against reigning Featherweight Champion Petch in the main event, also featured on the card is a welterweight bout between Jay Overmeer and Jamie Bates, plus a light heavyweight matchup between Nordine Mahieddine and Felipe Micheletti.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Antonio "Junior" Silva has dominated every one of his fights. Eric Pele may be the underdog, but he's riding his own winning streak. It's an earthquake when a 32-pound unstoppable force meets a 300-pound unmovable object. Roger Gracie is already at the top of the heap in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu and submission wrestling, now he's fighting MMA for the first time. He puts his reputation on the line as he faces Ron Waterman.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: A well-known name on the Russian MMA circuit, this fight is Martin Malhosyan's first chance at North American exposure. Stopping this dangerous fighter won't be easy, but Mike Patt's devastating submission win from series 1 proves he's ready. Wisniewski's development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Once Shane Thompson found boxing, he knew it would always be a passion in his life. His love of boxing is only rivaled by his love of teaching. He has combined the two aspects of his passion to help numerous MMA fighters become skilled in their stand up game.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Herb Veckenstedt as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. With top match making throughout the fight cards, they have been touted as some of the biggest and toughest fights in the UK. Shock N Awe consistently delivers hard hitting action, also going one step further by adding in the personalities from MC Ricky Wright, Ring Girls Poppy and Alex and as well as the huge UK fight teams!

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Ugo Okeke as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Vern McNeice as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Noah Ali takes us through a day of coaching and reveals how it has impacted his day-to-day life and what he loves about being on the outside of the cage. See what it takes to prepare other fighters for a match.

programme.title: OUT OF THE CAGE
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 OUT OF THE CAGE
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of a fight sport athlete, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Andrew Ross.

programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of a fight sport athlete, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Amy Roussey.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: A well-known name on the Russian MMA circuit, this fight is Martin Malhosyan's first chance at North American exposure. Stopping this dangerous fighter won't be easy, but Mike Patt's devastating submission win from series 1 proves he's ready. Wisniewski's development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.
